questions.question: Consider an image degraded by Gaussian noise. What is the primary effect of increasing the standard deviation of the Gaussian noise on the restoration process?
A low-pass filter is applied to an image with Gaussian noise. What is the expected outcome of this operation?

An image of a scene is degraded by additive white Gaussian noise with a standard deviation of 10 pixels. If the original image is restored using a maximum a posteriori (MAP) estimator, what is the expected impact of the noise level on the restoration accuracy?
